name: Chocolate-Covered Brandied Cherries
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour brandy over the drained cherries; let set for two days.
2. In a bowl, combine butter and salt; blend until smooth.
3. Add sifted powdered sugar and mix well. Knead until smooth and shiny; chill for 30 minutes wrapped in waxed paper.
4. While chilling, drain cherries well on paper towels; pat dry. (Reserve brandy marinade for brushing on cakes or for cooking)
5. Shape a marble-sized piece of fondant around each cherry; place on a wax paper-lined tray. Chill until firm, about 2 hours.
6. Melt chocolate separately over hot water, stirring constantly. Dip cherries and place on wax paper-lined tray.
7. Place in refrigerator to set. Store in a covered container in a cool, dark place for 10-14 days to fully ripen.
